description: The Rollin' 30s Harlem Crips are a set of the Crips street gang alliance, formed by Belizean American Crips who moved from South Los Angeles to Belize and then to Harlem, New York. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, prostitution, murder, and robbery. It was established in New York City in the late 1980s or early 1990s by Dalmin "Diamond" Mayen and his associates. The gang remains active in Los Angeles, New York City, and Belize City.

country_links.evidence_quote: While the gang was in Belize, it adopted its current name.
country_links.context: The gang was present in Belize, where it adopted its current name and spread Crips culture.
